---
title: ""
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css"> 

::: {.cv-page}

## CV

<div class="cv-download">
  <span class="teaching-syllabus-link">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    <a href="files/cv_Nov_28_2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      Access the detailed CV here.
    </a>
  </span>
</div>

::: {.cv-section}
<div class="cv-category">Education</div>

<div class="cv-item">
  <div><strong>MA in Economics</strong></div>
  <div>Tribhuvan University, Nepal (2008–2010)</div>

  <br>

  <div><strong>PhD in Economics</strong></div>
  <div>The University of Oklahoma (2022–present)</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.cv-section}
<div class="cv-category">Academic Experience</div>

<div class="cv-item">
  <div><strong>Graduate Teaching Assistant</strong></div>
  <div>The University of Oklahoma (2022–present)</div>
</div>
:::

:::
